security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://tiles.openfreemap.org https://basemaps.cartocdn.com https://*.inec.gov.ng https://viewer.geolibre.app; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://tiles.openfreemap.org; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; frame-src https://viewer.geolibre.app

bundle.shortDescription: INEC Election Field Kit with GeoLibre GIS
bundle.longDescription: Offline-capable GIS application for INEC election day field operations. Features polling unit mapping, result submission, GPS tracking, and spatial analysis powered by GeoLibre.
